body.title: Book ch3: add recall-first as preferred path lever
body.result: Added recall-first process lever to Chapter 3 — recall→bash→inference lookup order, connects to compiled inference principle
body.description:
Update lab/docs/the_ownership_gap/3.Levers.md to add recall-first as a preferred path lever. The pattern: 'what do I know about X?' before bash/grep. Every re-derivation of stored knowledge is waste. The lever is: recall(X) is the first lookup; bash is the fallback; inference is the last resort. Connect to the compiled inference principle — the more we recall, the less we re-derive.

**Affected files:** lab/docs/the_ownership_gap/3.Levers.md
**Design rules:** none
**Scope boundary:** one new lever section in Chapter 3; update version timestamp to current MT
**Test plan:** read file and verify new lever section present; version stamp updated
